generated_exposure.exposure_text:
🚨 Your local emergency services are being overwhelmed by preventable disasters. While politicians debate, our communities suffer. It's time to demand real civil defense preparedness! 🚨

Did you know that underfunded emergency response systems are leaving us vulnerable? Foreign adversaries exploit our weaknesses while our leaders dither. We need robust civil defense NOW to protect our families and neighborhoods. 

#NationalSecurity #CivilDefense #CommunitySafety
